value: ALIAS algorithm (Noël et al. 2025) is published in Spectrochimica Acta Part B, NOT arXiv:2501.01057 (that's an unrelated HPC paper). Semantic Scholar ID: 5e3927643fce6f405bf9417b1f8f0f254458436d. The Labutin 2013 correlation method (Analytical Chemistry) generates model spectra at estimated T to correlate with experimental — this is the approach we need to adopt. Jahoda et al. 2020 confirmed that cosine similarity with static NIST peaks achieves only 6.44% mineral accuracy, validating our finding that the VSM approach fundamentally fails without temperature adaptation.
